Operation 'listDocuments' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Missing summary entirely. Description lacks detail about pagination parameters, return structure, and what document metadata is included. AI agents need to understand pagination support and expected response format to use this effectively.

data.current_description: Retrieve the paginated list of documents.
data.summary_suggestion: List all uploaded documents with pagination
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of all documents in your account. Supports pagination parameters to control the number of results and offset. Returns an array of document objects containing metadata such as document ID, name, creation date, and status.
data.reasoning: Missing summary entirely. Description lacks detail about pagination parameters, return structure, and what document metadata is included. AI agents need to understand pagination support and expected response format to use this effectively.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve a specific document by ID
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information about a specific document by its ID. Returns the complete document object including metadata, configuration, and status. Requires the document_id path parameter. Returns 404 if the document does not exist.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description is too generic and doesn't specify what information is returned or error conditions. AI agents need to know what fields are included in the response and how to handle missing documents.

message: Operation 'updateDocument' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Missing summary. Description lacks specificity about what can be updated, that partial updates are supported, and what is returned. AI agents need to understand which fields are mutable and the response structure.

data.description_suggestion: Updates properties of a specific document using PATCH semantics. Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be modified. Common updatable fields include name, description, and configuration settings. Returns the updated document object. Requires the document_id path parameter.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description lacks specificity about what can be updated, that partial updates are supported, and what is returned. AI agents need to understand which fields are mutable and the response structure.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve a specific document submission by ID
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information about a specific submission by its ID.
